Sandy.description: Light, fast-draining soil. Low water retention. Warms up quickly.
Sandy.irrigation_need: High — water drains fast, irrigate more frequently
Sandy.tip: Add organic manure to improve water retention

Clayey.description: Heavy soil, high water retention, poor drainage, prone to waterlogging.

Loamy.description: Best all-purpose soil. Balanced sand, silt, clay. Excellent for most crops.
Loamy.tip: Most productive soil type — maintain with organic matter

Black.description: Black cotton soil (Regur). High clay content, moisture retention, fertile.
Black.irrigation_need: Low to moderate — retains moisture long after rain
Black.tip: Cracks when dry — mulching helps retain moisture

Red.description: Iron-rich red/laterite soil. Well-drained, slightly acidic. Lower fertility.
Red.tip: Add lime to correct acidity; supplement with NPK fertilizer
